title: Jurisdictional Authority
shortDefinition: A package-local authority concept bounded to the active sovereign-domain package.
fullDefinition: Authority as recognized inside the example sovereign domain stub. It extends the application of the core authority concept for this package boundary only and does not redefine the core meaning of authority across ChatPDM.

packageScope.boundaryNote: This concept resolves only inside the active package boundary and may not universalize itself by implication.

contexts.label: package-local doctrine
contexts.explanation: Used only when the example sovereign domain stub is explicitly selected.

contrast_prompts: How does package-local authority differ from the core concept of authority without redefining it?

authoringNotes: Example stub only. Not an active doctrinal package.
